example_jp: 野菜を食べさせられた。
example_en: I was made to eat vegetables.
I was made to drink alcohol.

example_jp: 長いレポートを書かされた。
example_en: I was made to write a long report.

example_jp: つまらない本を読まされた。
example_en: I was made to read a boring book.
I was made to do overtime.
I was made to wait an hour.

example_jp: カラオケで歌わされた。
example_en: I was made to sing at karaoke.

example_jp: 毎日遅くまで働かされた。
example_en: I was made to work late every day.
I was made to go on a business trip.

example_jp: スピーチをさせられた。
example_en: I was made to give a speech.

example_jp: 一人で掃除させられた。
example_en: I was made to clean alone.

example_jp: その映画に泣かされた。
example_en: I was made to cry by that movie.
I was made to come at dawn.
I was made to buy expensive things.

example_jp: グラウンドを走らされた。
example_en: I was made to run the field.
